examples.title: Pseudocode: Transaction Propagation
examples.description: Demonstrates how a transaction is propagated through the Bitcoin network
examples.code:
ALGORITHM PropagateTransaction
INPUT: transaction
OUTPUT: None

BEGIN
 FOR EACH connected peer
 IF peer is valid
 SEND transaction to peer
 END IF
 END FOR
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode shows how a transaction is propagated to all connected peers in the Bitcoin network.

examples.title: Python: Transaction Validation
examples.description: Demonstrates how a transaction is validated by a full node
examples.explanation: This Python code shows how a full node validates a transaction by checking its structure, inputs, outputs, and signature.

examples.title: C: Block Propagation
examples.description: Demonstrates how a block is propagated through the Bitcoin network
examples.explanation: This C code shows how a block is propagated to all connected peers in the Bitcoin network.
